ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_ids" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxonomic ID */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the organism belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum to which the organism belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the organism belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the organism belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the organism belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the organism belongs */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the organism belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID to establish a hierarchy */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the gene type is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES gene_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., GO term, pathway) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* User who added the annotation */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
